name: aapatt-emergency-superapp
description: Aapatt - Emergency Response Superapp for Developing Countries

scripts.build:all: npm run build:backend && npm run build:admin && npm run build:citizen && npm run build:provider
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../admin-dashboard && npm install && cd ../citizen-app && npm install && cd ../provider-app && npm install && cd ../shared && npm install

author: Aapatt Team
